summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InventoryPro chatbot functionality. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with real Supabase data integration and Emergent LLM responses.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns healthy status
Chat API accepts messages and returns AI responses
All 4 suggested questions work with real inventory data
Supabase integration returns real inventory data
Error handling works for malformed requests
Chatbot toggle button appears and positioned correctly
Welcome message and suggested questions display
Custom input field and send button work
Loading indicator appears during AI processing
Frontend-backend integration via Next.js API route
Real-time inventory data from Supabase displayed
Emergent LLM integration with GPT-4o-mini working
